name: STANDARDS-URLS registry: operator can add an entry with a new id; merged catalog includes both plugin-shipped and operator-added
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf "- id: operator-only-source
  name: Operator Only
  url: https://op.com
  tier: 2
  applies_to: [python]
  fetch_frequency: weekly
" > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/merge-registry.sh" --catalog "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/sources.yaml" --operator "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml" --emit "$PWD/merged.yaml" && grep "operator-only-source" merged.yaml 1>&2 && grep "google-tsguide" merged.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
